location.title: Location
location.text: At Douwe Egberts (Dubbelink 2) or home tutoring in Gein

weekendTutoring.title: Weekend Tutoring
weekendTutoring.description: Special weekend discount! Only €30 per hour (regular €60). Home tutoring available in Gein. Start with a free 30-minute trial lesson!
weekendTutoring.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the weekend tutoring program. Can I book a trial lesson?

personalCoaching.title: Personal Coaching
personalCoaching.description: Need guidance with your studies? Available weekends for €30/hour in Zuidoost. First 30-minute consultation is free!
personalCoaching.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in personal coaching. Can you tell me more?

flexibleSupport.title: Flexible Support
flexibleSupport.description: Whether it's math, coaching, or just discussing your studies - I'm here to help! Special rate of €30/hour (save €30). Home service in Gein.
flexibleSupport.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in flexible study support. I'd like to learn more about the possibilities.

location.name: Douwe Egberts Café
location.description: Centrally located in Amsterdam Zuidoost, right at Bijlmer Arena metro station. Easily accessible by public transport and car.
